About Me

Who I am

I'm Perry Philip J. Lozano, a motivated Software Developer based in Urdaneta City, Pangasinan, Philippines. I recently completed my Bachelor of Science in Information Technology at Urdaneta City University and a hands-on internship at EasyCom Japan Philippines.

During my internship, I built a cross-platform Human Resource Information System from the ground up — designing RESTful APIs, managing database schemas with Prisma ORM, documenting endpoints with Swagger, and shipping mobile interfaces with React Native and TypeScript.

My foundation spans full-stack web and mobile development — Laravel on the backend, Flutter and React Native on mobile, and solid SQL database design throughout. I thrive in agile environments and take pride in writing code that is clean, well-documented, and maintainable by a team.

Looking to contribute my technical skills and growth mindset to an innovative development team. Open to full-time roles, freelance work, and meaningful collaborations.

Where I've worked

Software Developer Intern

EasyCom Japan Philippines

Projects

Things I've built

Human Resource Information System

Web & Mobile · Internship

Full-featured HRIS covering employee records, attendance tracking, and HR workflows — built for both web and mobile with a unified TypeScript backend.

  • Architected the backend with TypeScript and managed DB schema using Prisma ORM with SQL
  • Documented all REST API endpoints with Swagger for streamlined team collaboration and QA
  • Managed source code and feature branches using Git for version control
Tech Stack TypeScript React Native SQL Prisma ORM Swagger DBeaver Git

School Management Portal

Web & Mobile · Academic

School management system for a TESDA institution covering enrollment, grading, and scheduling — with a Flutter companion app for Android.

  • Built the web backend using Laravel MVC with Eloquent ORM and MySQL for data persistence
  • Created a companion mobile app using Flutter for student and admin access on Android
  • Used Git for version control and collaborative development throughout the lifecycle
Tech Stack Laravel Flutter MySQL Eloquent ORM Blade Git

PCF Presenter

Desktop App (Windows / macOS / Linux)  ·  Mobile Remote  ·  Client Project

Offline-first worship presentation system for PCF Church — a full desktop app with Wi-Fi mobile remote, real-time WebSocket sync, and zero internet dependency during live Sunday services.

  • Architected a RESTful JSON API backend with Laravel and SQLite for lightweight offline-first local data persistence
  • Built the main projector operator interface as a cross-platform desktop app using Flutter (Windows / macOS / Linux)
  • Developed a Flutter mobile companion app as a Wi-Fi remote for song navigation and slide control
  • Integrated Laravel Reverb (WebSockets) for real-time sync across projector output, stage display, and remote control
  • Implemented a Song Library with lyric search and section tagging, plus a Scripture Browser with KJV, ASV, and Tagalog Bibles
  • Designed a Stage Display view showing current/next slide, countdown timer, and operator messages
Tech Stack Flutter Dart Laravel PHP SQLite REST API WebSockets Laravel Reverb Git
